creator: bigtoine976
title: Bepo v14.2, add @descend, duplicate math key
notes:
FOR CUSTOMS, LOCALE ARE IN QUERTY, NOT AZERTY

Caps is replaced with Esc, and backtick with Alt in my xkb layout (I keep it for better compatibility with usual keyboards).
Ctrl+J is tmux's prefix (Ctrl+T).
Ctrl+C is cut           (Ctrl+X).
Ctrl+H is copy          (Ctrl+C).
Ctrl+U is paste         (Ctrl+V).
Ctrl+A is sel all       (Ctrl+A).
Ctrl+] is undo          (Ctrl+Z).
Ctrl+X is redo          (Ctrl+Y).
Ctrl+K is save          (Ctrl+S).
Ctrl+\ is search        (Ctrl+f)
